name: zero-md
when_to_use: 需要把 AI 原生 Markdown 字符串直接渲成带一致排版、代码高亮、公式和 Mermaid 的隔离长文时用它而非手写 HTML,因为原生在 Markdown 解析、语法高亮与样式封装上失败。
why_valuable: AI 默认能写 Markdown 但只能不稳定地改写成 HTML,做不到解析器边界、代码语言高亮、KaTeX/Mermaid 按需加载与 Shadow DOM 样式隔离;zero-md 把一条 notation string 直接变成完整文档视图。

en.when_to_use: Use it when you need to render an AI-native Markdown string directly as an isolated long-form document with consistent typography, code highlighting, formulas, and Mermaid instead of hand-writing HTML. Native implementations fail on Markdown parsing, syntax highlighting, and style encapsulation.
en.why_valuable: AI can write Markdown by default but can only rewrite it to HTML unreliably. It cannot provide parser boundaries, language-aware code highlighting, on-demand KaTeX/Mermaid loading, and Shadow DOM style isolation. zero-md turns one notation string directly into a complete document view.

data_in.note: markdown is raw Markdown text. boot feeds it to the component through a script[type='text/markdown'] child created in JS. raw HTML is preserved by the parser, so untrusted content must be sanitized first.

schema.markdown: string - complete Markdown document; empty string is valid
schema.body_class?: string - class appended to the internal markdown-body, default empty string

data_in.note: markdown 是原始 Markdown 文本,boot 会以 JS 创建的 script[type='text/markdown'] 子节点喂给组件;raw HTML 会被解析器保留,不可信内容须先净化。
data_in._why_no_example: Markdown 是 AI 原生记法且只有一个主字符串,schema 足矣、不附 minimal example;空字符串是合法空态。

schema.markdown: string —— 完整 Markdown 文档;空字符串合法
schema.body_class?: string —— 追加到内部 markdown-body 的 class,默认空字符串

uplink: 纯显示组件,默认无需上行;它非做 Markdown 编辑器、协作编辑器或表单提交器。

carriers.widget: conditional:自带 shadow 样式零足迹,但运行时会从 jsDelivr 动态加载 marked、highlight.js、KaTeX/Mermaid 及主题 CSS,宿主须放行这些网络资源
carriers.codex: conditional:ESM/custom elements 可用;同样依赖 jsDelivr 动态模块与样式加载

isolation.evidence: Core verified clean (src/lib/*.js read in full). styleInject=no: all CSS -- `<link>` github-markdown-css@5 / @highlightjs/cdn-assets@11 / katex@0 + `<style>` HOST (presets.js) -- is stamped into `.markdown-styles` INSIDE the component's own shadow root (connectedCallback attachShadow + stamp()); nothing reaches document.head. domMutation=no: only this.root.prepend()/node.append() into the shadow root; no document.body writes. events=no: click listener bound to this.shadowRoot and removed in disconnectedCallback; MutationObserver observes `this` element and disconnect()s on disconnect -- zero window/document listeners. shadow=conditional: self-encapsulates in its own shadow root (designed for it) and nests cleanly in a widget shadow, BUT at runtime dynamically import()s marked/hljs/katex/mermaid AND fetches theme CSS `<link>` from jsDelivr, so the host CSP must allow those network fetches. CAVEAT: mermaid@11 is loaded on-demand ONLY for ```mermaid code blocks; its entry does createElement('style') and mermaid is documented to inject styles + measure via top-level DOM, but its lazy render chunks were not fully traced this session -- so styleInject/domMutation could flip to yes when the markdown contains mermaid diagrams.

minimal.markdown:
# zero-md Demo

A **Markdown string** rendered with *consistent typography*, syntax highlighting, and math — all inside a self-contained Shadow DOM.

## Features

- GitHub-flavored **tables** and lists
- Syntax-highlighted `code` blocks via highlight.js
- KaTeX formulas, inline and display

| Feature    | Status |
| ---------- | :----: |
| Tables     | ✅ |
| Code       | ✅ |
| KaTeX math | ✅ |

```js
function greet(name) {
  return `Hello, ${name}!`
}
console.log(greet('zero-md'))
```

> Everything on this page is a single Markdown string handed to `<zero-md>`.

The quadratic roots of $ax^2 + bx + c = 0$ are:

$$x = \frac{-b \pm \sqrt{b^2 - 4ac}}{2a}$$
